title: Extracting Birthdays from a String
scenario: Write a prompt to extract birthdays in the format 'MM/DD/YYYY' from a given string containing multiple birthdays.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated Python function must meet all the specified constraints.
The generated Python function should be syntactically correct.
The generated Python function should correctly extract birthdays in the format 'MM/DD/YYYY'.
